chain.thought: Explanation: Considering only results before 2010, the positions were 6th (2005 World Youth Championships), 5th (2006 World Junior Championships), 10th (2008 Olympic Games), 8th (2009 European U23 Championships), and 22nd (2009 World Championships). The best position is 5th at the 2006 World Junior Championships.

judge_thought: Explanation: Reviewing all entries before 2010 shows positions of 6th (2005), 5th (2006), 10th (2008), 8th (2009), and 22nd (q) (2009). None of these are podium finishes (top 3), so there is no qualifying “best position” competition in that timeframe. Hence, returning null appropriately reflects that no competition achieved a standout best position before 2010.
